paragraphs.title: Resumen de Alertas
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Resumen de alertas por nivel de riesgo y stock
import org.apache.spark.sql.functions._

val alerts = spark.table("logistica.fact_alerts")

val summary = alerts.groupBy("risk_level", "stock_status").agg(
  count("*").alias("count"),
  avg("risk_score").alias("avg_risk_score"),
  avg("severity").alias("avg_severity")
)
summary.orderBy(desc("avg_risk_score")).show()

paragraphs.title: Alertas Criticas
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Alertas con severity >= 4
val alerts = spark.table("logistica.fact_alerts")
val critical = alerts.filter(col("severity") >= 4)
critical.show(20, false)

paragraphs.title: Opciones de Contingencia
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Opciones de recuperación área
val contingency = spark.table("logistica.fact_air_recovery_options")
contingency.show(20, false)

paragraphs.title: Por Region
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Distribución de alertas por región
val alerts = spark.table("logistica.fact_alerts")
alerts.groupBy("region").count().orderBy(desc("count")).show()
